note: judge_found_rate = share of matcher-unreachable items where the judge finds a top-10 candidate expressing the GT fact. High -> the severe matcher inflates unreachability (metric artifact); ~0 -> the retrieval gap is real. corrected_reachable_at10 = reachable@0.94 + unreachable_share * judge_found_rate.
